'''''Suili''''' was a [[C-3 passenger liner]] which was used for tourism. It was present in the [[Nezni system/Legends|Nezni system]] where an incident between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Hurrim]] took place.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
